name: Limitless
description: An inherited technique passed down in the Gojo Family. It brings the concept of 'Infinity' into reality, allowing the user to manipulate and distort space at will.

name: Ten Shadows Technique
description: An inherited technique of the Zenin Family. It allows the user to summon ten different shikigami using shadows as an intermediary.

name: Cleave and Dismantle
description: Sukuna's innate technique consisting of two distinct slashing attacks. Dismantle is a standard slash, while Cleave adjusts itself to the target's toughness.

name: Straw Doll Technique
description: A technique that uses a hammer, nails, and a straw doll to attack a target from a distance by striking a piece of the target.

name: Cursed Speech
description: An inherited technique of the Inumaki family. It infuses words with cursed energy, compelling listeners to act according to the command.
